title: Momaga Bandanu Thathana Manege
desc: A grandson creates meaningful final memories with his dying grandfather.

title: Naanu Nanna Hendthi
desc: A young musician is shocked when a strange woman turns up, claiming to be his wife.

title: Bombat Robo
desc: A brilliant scientist creates a robot to protect humankind, but his plans soon backfire.

title: Belli
desc: Belli decides to avenge the death of his gangster boss who is killed by his rivals.

title: Thavarina Thottilu
desc: Fate brings a greedy Thimanna and his family to book for all his misdeeds.

title: Soorarai Pottru
desc: A young man from a remote village dreams of launching his own airline service.

title: Janani
desc: Gowda wrongly thinks wife cheated but Kasim helps her prove she's innocent in the end.

title: Hosa Baduku
desc: A man tries to help his late lover's lookalike but society misunderstands his intentions.

title: Teleshopping
desc: The host highlights the features of a variety of products for purchase.

title: Belli Kalungura
desc: After marrying a wealthy man, Bhadra is mistreated by her husband's relatives.

title: Mathe Hadithu Kogile
desc: On knowing about his daughter's affair, a business tycoon tries separating the couple.

title: Excuse Me
desc: Sunil pretends to be his friend Ajay, a musician, to impress a girl who loves music.

title: Sarkari Hiriya Prathamika Shaale Kasaragodu
desc: In Kasaragod, students and their teacher fight to save their beloved school from closure.

title: Purushotthama
desc: To seek revenge for her father's death, a woman hires a fraudster, Raja.
